creator: rostyslav@optonline.net
text:
I have HP Pavilion DV8000(AMD Turion64) with broadcom wireless.
the fake interface (fwe0) don't work. So i converted and installed driver from windowsXP SP33008A.exe(bcmwl564.inf and *.sys) with ndisgen *.inf *.sys, then cp bcmwl564_sys.ko to /boot/modules.
I rty to use it but whatever i do can't get link "ndis0 no link.....giving up"

Halp me plaese.
Ross.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
